page_content:
Repeatable to: 9 credits.

PSYC819 Seminar in Personality and Development (3 Credits) An advanced seminar covering specialized topics. Repeatable to: 9 credits.

PSYC859 Special Topics in Perception (3 Credits) Intensive study of selected topics in perception. Prerequisite: PSYC605; or permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 6 credits.

PSYC878 Current Research in Language and Cognition (3 Credits) Seminar will cover current research and methodological issues in language and cognition. Specialized topics include: computer models of cognitive behavior; cross-cultural studies in language and thought; mathematical and analytical techniques for assessing structures; and others.
